since_last: 12% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads -0.20%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 12% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -1.88% · Gold -1.86% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 12% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at -0.20%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.20%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.51%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +10.00%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +10.00%, BIDU +4.74%, PUBM +2.93%, D +0.97%, AVAV +0.84%. Laggards: RXRX -4.69%, MU -4.08%, CEVA -3.88%, NOW -3.75%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.46% at $150.16
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.46% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
